parameters.query:
WITH policy AS (
  SELECT
    gp.group_jid,
    gp.group_name,
    gp.only_admins_can_post,
    gp.auto_delete_enabled,
    gp.auto_remove_enabled,
    gp.min_score_to_remove,
    gp.min_score_to_delete,
    gp.admin_alert_number
  FROM group_policies gp
  WHERE gp.group_jid = '{{ $json.groupJid }}'
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  COALESCE(
    (SELECT row_to_json(policy) FROM policy),
    '{}'::json
  ) AS policy,
  COALESCE(
    (
      SELECT json_agg(ts.phone)
      FROM trusted_senders ts
      WHERE ts.active = true
        AND (
          ts.group_jid = '{{ $json.groupJid }}'
          OR ts.group_jid IS NULL
        )
    ),
    '[]'::json
  ) AS whitelist,
  COALESCE(
    (
      SELECT json_agg(cs)
      FROM contact_scores cs
      WHERE cs.phone = '{{ $json.senderPhone }}'
      LIMIT 1
    ),
    '[]'::json
  ) AS score_rows;

INSERT INTO moderation_incidents (
  occurred_at,
  group_jid,
  sender_phone,
  sender_jid,
  message_id,
  message_text,
  event_name,
  score,
  reasons,
  delete_attempted,
  remove_attempted,
  raw_payload
) VALUES (
  NOW(),
  '{{ $json.groupJid }}',
  '{{ $json.senderPhone }}',
  '{{ $json.senderJid }}',
  '{{ $json.messageId }}',
  $${{ ($json.messageText || '').replace(/\$/g, 'USD') }}$$,
  '{{ $json.event }}',
  {{ $json.score }},
  $${{ JSON.stringify($json.reasons || []) }}$$::jsonb,
  {{ $json.shouldDelete ? 'true' : 'false' }},
  {{ $json.shouldRemove ? 'true' : 'false' }},
  $${{ JSON.stringify($json.raw || {}) }}$$::jsonb
);

INSERT INTO participant_snapshots (group_jid, participant_jid, phone, is_present, source, last_seen_at, updated_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.groupJid }}',
  '{{ $json.participantJid }}',
  '{{ $json.phone }}',
  {{ $json.action === 'remove' ? 'false' : 'true' }},
  'webhook',
  '{{ $json.seenAt }}',
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (group_jid, phone)
DO UPDATE SET
  participant_jid = EXCLUDED.participant_jid,
  is_present = EXCLUDED.is_present,
  source = EXCLUDED.source,
  last_seen_at = EXCLUDED.last_seen_at,
  updated_at = NOW();

INSERT INTO participant_snapshots (
  group_jid, participant_jid, phone, is_admin, is_present, source, last_seen_at, updated_at
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.groupJid }}',
  {{ $json.participantJid ? "'" + $json.participantJid + "'" : "NULL" }},
  {{ $json.phone ? "'" + $json.phone + "'" : "NULL" }},
  {{ $json.isAdmin ? 'true' : 'false' }},
  true,
  '{{ $json.source }}',
  NOW(),
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (group_jid, phone)
DO UPDATE SET
  participant_jid = EXCLUDED.participant_jid,
  is_admin = EXCLUDED.is_admin,
  is_present = true,
  source = EXCLUDED.source,
  last_seen_at = NOW(),
  updated_at = NOW();

SELECT
  ps.phone,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ps.group_jid) FILTER (WHERE ps.is_present = true AND ps.phone IS NOT NULL) AS group_count,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ps.is_present = true AND ps.updated_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND ps.phone IS NOT NULL) AS recent_joins_24h,
  COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN mi.occurred_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS incidents_7d,
  COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN mi.remove_attempted = true AND mi.occurred_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS removals_30d,
  COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN mi.delete_attempted = true AND mi.occurred_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS deletions_7d
FROM participant_snapshots ps
LEFT JOIN moderation_incidents mi
  ON mi.sender_phone = ps.phone
WHERE ps.phone IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY ps.phone;

INSERT INTO contact_scores (
  phone, score, risk_level, reason_summary, metrics, updated_at
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.phone }}',
  {{ $json.score }},
  '{{ $json.riskLevel }}',
  $${{ JSON.stringify($json.reasonSummary || []) }}$$::jsonb,
  $${{ JSON.stringify($json.metrics || {}) }}$$::jsonb,
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (phone)
DO UPDATE SET
  score = EXCLUDED.score,
  risk_level = EXCLUDED.risk_level,
  reason_summary = EXCLUDED.reason_summary,
  metrics = EXCLUDED.metrics,
  updated_at = NOW();
